        // ============================================
        // CORE FUNCTIONS
        // ============================================
        
        function registerTest(name, description, testFn, sourceCode = null) {
            state.tests.push({
                name,
                description,
                testFn,
                sourceCode: sourceCode || (typeof testFn === 'string' ? testFn : testFn.toString())
            });
        }

        async function runTest(test, updateUI, iframeIndex = 0) {
            state.currentTest = test;
            
            // Update iframe label to show current test
            updateIframeLabel(iframeIndex, test.name, true);
            
            const result = {
                name: test.name,
                description: test.description,
                status: 'running',
                steps: [],
                error: null,
                startTime: Date.now(),
                endTime: null,
                duration: null,
                consoleLogs: [],
                inputCalls: [],
                outputCalls: []
            };

            state.results.push(result);
            updateUI();

            try {
                const iframe = document.getElementById(`component-iframe-${iframeIndex}`);
                const iframeWindow = iframe.contentWindow;

                const ctx = {
                    step: (message) => {
                        result.steps.push({ message, status: 'success' });
                        updateUI();
                    },
                    assert: (condition, message) => {
                        if (!condition) {
                            const error = new Error(`Assertion failed: ${message}`);
                            error.isAssertion = true;
                            throw error;
                        }
                    },
                    assertEqual: (actual, expected, message) => {
                        if (JSON.stringify(actual) !== JSON.stringify(expected)) {
                            const error = new Error(message);
                            error.isAssertion = true;
                            error.expected = expected;
                            error.actual = actual;
                            throw error;
                        }
                    },
                    wait: (ms) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms)),
                    window: iframeWindow,
                    initComponent: iframeWindow.myop_init_interface,
                    getElement: (selector) => iframeWindow.document.querySelector(selector),
                    getElements: (selector) => iframeWindow.document.querySelectorAll(selector)
                };

                let functionBody;
                if (typeof test.testFn === 'string') {
                    functionBody = test.testFn;
                } else {
                    const match = test.testFn.toString().match(/^async function[^{]*{([\s\S]*)}$/);
                    functionBody = match ? match[1].trim() : test.testFn.toString();
                }

                const testFunction = iframeWindow.eval(`
                    (async function(ctx) {
                        ${functionBody}
                    })
                `);

                await testFunction.call(iframeWindow, ctx);
                
                result.status = 'passed';
                result.endTime = Date.now();
            } catch (error) {
                result.status = 'failed';
                result.error = error.message;
                result.endTime = Date.now();
                result.steps.push({ message: error.message, status: 'error' });
                
                if (error.isAssertion && error.expected !== undefined && error.actual !== undefined) {
                    result.expected = error.expected;
                    result.actual = error.actual;
                    result.hasDiff = true;
                }
            }

            result.duration = result.endTime - result.startTime;

            // Update iframe label to show test name (tooltip appears on hover)
            updateIframeLabel(iframeIndex, test.name, false);

            // Capture screenshot
            try {
                result.screenshot = await captureScreenshot(iframeIndex);
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Screenshot failed:', e);
            }

            updateUI();
            return result;
        }

        async function captureScreenshot(iframeIndex = 0) {
            const iframe = document.getElementById(`component-iframe-${iframeIndex}`);
            const doc = iframe.contentDocument || iframe.contentWindow.document;
            const body = doc.body;

            if (typeof html2canvas === 'undefined') return null;

            const canvas = await html2canvas(body, {
                allowTaint: true,
                useCORS: true,
                logging: false,
                width: iframe.offsetWidth,
                height: iframe.offsetHeight
            });

            return canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
        }

        // ============================================
        // UI UPDATE FUNCTIONS
        // ============================================
        
        function updateUI() {
            updateSummary();
            updateTestsList();
            updateResultsList();
            updateFilterCounts();
            updateEmptyState();
            updateClearButton();
            updateActionButtons();
        }

        function updateClearButton() {
            const clearBtn = document.getElementById('btn-clear');
            if (state.results.length > 0) {
                clearBtn.disabled = false;
            } else {
                clearBtn.disabled = true;
            }
        }

        function updateActionButtons() {
            const reloadBtn = document.getElementById('btn-reload');
            const runAllBtn = document.getElementById('btn-run-all');
            const hasTests = state.tests.length > 0;

            reloadBtn.disabled = !hasTests;
            runAllBtn.disabled = !hasTests;
        }

        function updateEmptyState() {
            const emptyState = document.getElementById('empty-state-tests');
            const iframeContainer = document.getElementById('iframe-container');

            if (state.tests.length === 0) {
                // Show empty state in middle panel
                emptyState.style.display = 'flex';
                iframeContainer.style.display = 'none';
            } else {
                // Hide empty state and show iframe
                emptyState.style.display = 'none';
                iframeContainer.style.display = 'grid';
            }

            // Never collapse the left panel - keep filter buttons and parallel control visible
        }

        function updateSummary() {
            const total = state.tests.length;
            const passed = state.results.filter(r => r.status === 'passed').length;
            const failed = state.results.filter(r => r.status === 'failed').length;
            const running = state.results.filter(r => r.status === 'running').length;

            document.getElementById('total-tests').textContent = total;
            document.getElementById('passed-tests').textContent = passed;
            document.getElementById('failed-tests').textContent = failed;
            document.getElementById('running-tests').textContent = running;

            // Also update floating summary
            const floatingTotal = document.getElementById('floating-total-tests');
            if (floatingTotal) {
                floatingTotal.textContent = total;
                document.getElementById('floating-passed-tests').textContent = passed;
                document.getElementById('floating-failed-tests').textContent = failed;
                document.getElementById('floating-running-tests').textContent = running;
            }
        }

        function updateFilterCounts() {
            const total = state.tests.length;
            const failed = state.results.filter(r => r.status === 'failed').length;

            document.getElementById('filter-all-count').textContent = total;
            document.getElementById('filter-failed-count').textContent = failed;
        }

        function updateTestsList() {
            const container = document.getElementById('tests-list');
            
            let filteredTests = state.tests;
            if (state.currentFilter === 'failed') {
                filteredTests = state.tests.filter(test => {
                    const result = state.results.find(r => r.name === test.name);
                    return result && result.status === 'failed';
                });
            }

            if (filteredTests.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">
                        <div class="empty-state-text">${state.currentFilter === 'failed' ? 'No failed tests' : 'No test has been created yet'}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }

            container.innerHTML = filteredTests.map((test, idx) => {
                const testIndex = state.tests.indexOf(test);
                const result = state.results.find(r => r.name === test.name);
                let statusBadge = '<span class="status-badge ready">Ready</span>';
                
                if (result) {
                    if (result.status === 'passed') {
                        statusBadge = '<span class="status-badge passed">Passed</span>';
                    } else if (result.status === 'failed') {
                        statusBadge = '<span class="status-badge failed">Failed</span>';
                    } else if (result.status === 'running') {
                        statusBadge = '<span class="status-badge running"><span class="spinner"></span>Running</span>';
                    }
                }

                // New test card (editing mode)
                if (test.isNew) {
                    // Determine if we're currently editing name or description
                    const isEditingName = state.newTestEditingField === `name-${testIndex}`;
                    const isEditingDesc = state.newTestEditingField === `desc-${testIndex}`;
                    
                    const nameDisplay = isEditingName 
                        ? `<input type="text" 
                               id="new-test-name-${testIndex}"
                               class="test-card-name-input" 
                               placeholder="Enter name"
                               value="${escapeHtml(test.name)}"
                               oninput="updateNewTestName(${testIndex}, this.value)"
                               onblur="handleNewTestFieldBlur(${testIndex}, 'name')"
                               onkeydown="if(event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); startEditingNewTestField(${testIndex}, 'desc'); } if(event.key === 'Escape') { cancelNewTest(${testIndex}); }">`
                        : `<div class="test-card-name-text" onclick="startEditingNewTestField(${testIndex}, 'name')">${test.name || 'Untitled test'}</div>`;
                    
                    const descDisplay = isEditingDesc
                        ? `<input type="text"
                               id="new-test-desc-${testIndex}"
                               class="test-card-description-input"
                               placeholder="Enter description"
                               value="${escapeHtml(test.description)}"
                               oninput="updateNewTestDescription(${testIndex}, this.value)"
                               onblur="handleNewTestFieldBlur(${testIndex}, 'desc')"
                               onkeydown="if(event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); saveNewTest(${testIndex}); } if(event.key === 'Escape') { cancelNewTest(${testIndex}); }">`
                        : `<div class="test-card-description-text" onclick="startEditingNewTestField(${testIndex}, 'desc')">${test.description || 'No description'}</div>`;
                    
                    return `
                        <div class="test-card is-new" id="test-card-${testIndex}">
                            <div class="test-card-top">
                                <div class="test-card-content">
                                    ${nameDisplay}
                                    ${descDisplay}
                                </div>
                                ${statusBadge}
                            </div>
                            <div class="test-card-footer">
                                <button class="test-code-toggle" onclick="toggleTestCode(${testIndex})" id="code-toggle-${testIndex}">
                                    <span class="test-code-toggle-icon">
                                        <svg width="8" height="4" viewBox="0 0 8 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                            <path d="M1 1L4 3.5L7 1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                        </svg>
                                    </span>
                                    <span class="test-code-toggle-text">Code</span>
                                </button>
                                <div class="test-card-actions">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="cancelNewTest(${testIndex})">Cancel</button>
                                    <button class="btn-save" onclick="saveNewTest(${testIndex})">Save</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="test-code-section" id="code-section-${testIndex}">
                                <div class="test-code-viewer" id="code-viewer-${testIndex}">${escapeHtml(test.sourceCode)}</div>
                                <div class="test-code-editor-container" id="editor-container-${testIndex}">
                                    <div class="monaco-editor-wrapper" id="monaco-editor-${testIndex}"></div>
                                    <div class="test-code-editor-actions">
                                        <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="cancelEdit(${testIndex})">Cancel</button>
                                        <button class="btn btn-save" onclick="saveTestCode(${testIndex})">Save</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }

                // Regular test card
                const isDefaultName = test.name === 'Untitled Test' || test.name === 'Untitled test';
                const isDefaultDesc = test.description === 'No description';
                
                // Check if this test is being edited
                const isEditingName = state.editingTestField === `name-${testIndex}`;
                const isEditingDesc = state.editingTestField === `desc-${testIndex}`;
                const isEditing = isEditingName || isEditingDesc;
                
                // Name display - either input or text
                let nameDisplay;
                if (isEditingName) {
                    nameDisplay = `<input type="text" 
                           id="edit-test-name-${testIndex}"
                           class="test-card-name-input" 
                           value="${escapeHtml(test.name)}"
                           oninput="updateTestName(${testIndex}, this.value)"
                           onblur="handleTestFieldBlur(${testIndex}, 'name')"
                           onkeydown="if(event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); saveTestChanges(${testIndex}); } if(event.key === 'Escape') { cancelTestEdit(${testIndex}); }">`;
                } else {
                    const nameClass = isDefaultName ? 'test-card-name editable-field has-tooltip is-default' : 'test-card-name editable-field has-tooltip';
                    nameDisplay = `<div class="${nameClass}" data-tooltip="${escapeHtml(test.name)}" onclick="startEditingTestName(${testIndex})">${escapeHtml(test.name)}</div>`;
                }
                
                // Description display - either input or text
                let descDisplay;
                if (isEditingDesc) {
                    descDisplay = `<input type="text"
                           id="edit-test-desc-${testIndex}"
                           class="test-card-description-input"
                           value="${escapeHtml(test.description)}"
                           oninput="updateTestDescription(${testIndex}, this.value)"
                           onblur="handleTestFieldBlur(${testIndex}, 'desc')"
                           onkeydown="if(event.key === 'Enter') { event.preventDefault(); saveTestChanges(${testIndex}); } if(event.key === 'Escape') { cancelTestEdit(${testIndex}); }">`;
                } else {
                    const descClass = isDefaultDesc ? 'test-card-description editable-field is-default' : 'test-card-description editable-field';
                    descDisplay = `<div class="${descClass}" title="${escapeHtml(test.description)}" onclick="startEditingTestDesc(${testIndex})">${escapeHtml(test.description)}</div>`;
                }
                
                // Footer actions: when editing show Cancel/Save, otherwise show Menu/Run
                const footerActions = isEditing 
                    ? `<div class="test-card-actions">
                           <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="cancelTestEdit(${testIndex})">Cancel</button>
                           <button class="btn-save" onclick="saveTestChanges(${testIndex})">Save</button>
                       </div>`
                    : `<div class="test-card-actions">
                           <div class="test-menu-wrapper">
                               <button class="btn-menu" onclick="toggleTestMenu(${testIndex})" title="More actions">
                                   <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                       <rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="23" height="23" rx="5.5" stroke="#D3D1D5"/>
                                       <g clip-path="url(#clip_menu_${testIndex})">
                                           <path d="M12.5 11.5C12.5 10.9477 12.0523 10.5 11.5 10.5C10.9477 10.5 10.5 10.9477 10.5 11.5C10.5 12.0523 10.9477 12.5 11.5 12.5C12.0523 12.5 12.5 12.0523 12.5 11.5Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                           <path d="M12.5 6.5C12.5 5.94772 12.0523 5.5 11.5 5.5C10.9477 5.5 10.5 5.94772 10.5 6.5C10.5 7.05228 10.9477 7.5 11.5 7.5C12.0523 7.5 12.5 7.05228 12.5 6.5Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                           <path d="M12.5 16.5C12.5 15.9477 12.0523 15.5 11.5 15.5C10.9477 15.5 10.5 15.9477 10.5 16.5C10.5 17.0523 10.9477 17.5 11.5 17.5C12.0523 17.5 12.5 17.0523 12.5 16.5Z" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                       </g>
                                       <defs>
                                           <clipPath id="clip_menu_${testIndex}">
                                               <rect width="16" height="16" fill="white" transform="translate(4 4)"/>
                                           </clipPath>
                                       </defs>
                                   </svg>
                               </button>
                               <div class="test-menu" id="test-menu-${testIndex}">
                                   <div class="test-menu-item" onclick="duplicateTest(${testIndex}); closeTestMenu(${testIndex})">Duplicate</div>
                                   <div class="test-menu-item" onclick="editTestCode(${testIndex}); closeTestMenu(${testIndex})">Edit</div>
                                   <div class="test-menu-item danger" onclick="deleteTest(${testIndex}); closeTestMenu(${testIndex})">Delete</div>
                               </div>
                           </div>
                           <button class="btn btn-run" onclick="runSingleTest(${testIndex})">Run</button>
                       </div>`;
                
                return `
                    <div class="test-card${isEditing ? ' is-editing' : ''}" id="test-card-${testIndex}">
                        <div class="test-card-top">
                            <div class="test-card-content">
                                ${nameDisplay}
                                ${descDisplay}
                            </div>
                            ${statusBadge}
                        </div>
                        <div class="test-card-footer">
                            <button class="test-code-toggle" onclick="toggleTestCode(${testIndex})" id="code-toggle-${testIndex}">
                                <span class="test-code-toggle-icon">
                                    <svg width="8" height="4" viewBox="0 0 8 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                        <path d="M1 1L4 3.5L7 1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </span>
                                <span class="test-code-toggle-text">Code</span>
                            </button>
                            ${footerActions}
                        </div>
                        <div class="test-code-section" id="code-section-${testIndex}">
                            <div class="test-code-viewer" id="code-viewer-${testIndex}">${escapeHtml(test.sourceCode)}</div>
                            <div class="test-code-editor-container" id="editor-container-${testIndex}">
                                <div class="monaco-editor-wrapper" id="monaco-editor-${testIndex}"></div>
                                <div class="test-code-editor-actions">
                                    <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="cancelEdit(${testIndex})">Cancel</button>
                                    <button class="btn btn-save" onclick="saveTestCode(${testIndex})">Save</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        function updateResultsList() {
            const container = document.getElementById('results-list');

            // Filter results based on current filter
            let filteredResults = state.results;
            if (state.resultsFilter !== 'all') {
                filteredResults = state.results.filter(r => r.status === state.resultsFilter);
            }

            if (state.results.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="results-empty-state">
                        <span>Please run your tests to see results here</span>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }

            if (filteredResults.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="results-empty-state">
                        <span>No ${state.resultsFilter} tests</span>
                    </div>
                `;
                return;
            }

            container.innerHTML = filteredResults.map((result, idx) => {
                let statusBadge = '';
                if (result.status === 'passed') {
                    statusBadge = '<span class="result-status-badge passed">Passed</span>';
                } else if (result.status === 'failed') {
                    statusBadge = '<span class="result-status-badge failed">Failed</span>';
                } else if (result.status === 'running') {
                    statusBadge = '<span class="result-status-badge running"><span class="spinner"></span>Running</span>';
                }

                // Build steps list HTML
                const stepsHtml = result.steps && result.steps.length > 0 
                    ? `<div class="result-steps-list">
                        ${result.steps.map(s => `<div class="result-step ${s.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'failed'}">${s.status === 'success' ? '✓' : '✗'} ${s.message}</div>`).join('')}
                       </div>`
                    : '';

                // Count console logs, input calls, output calls
                const consoleCount = result.consoleLogs ? result.consoleLogs.length : 0;
                const inputCount = result.inputCalls ? result.inputCalls.length : 0;
                const outputCount = result.outputCalls ? result.outputCalls.length : 0;

                return `
                    <div class="result-item">
                        <div class="result-item-top">
                            <div class="result-item-title">
                                <span class="result-item-name has-tooltip" data-tooltip="${result.name}">
                                    ${result.name}
                                </span>
                                <span class="result-item-description" title="${result.description}">${result.description}</span>
                            </div>
                            ${statusBadge}
                        </div>

                        <div class="result-data-pills">
                            ${result.duration !== null ? `<span class="result-data-pill">Duration: ${result.duration}ms</span>` : ''}
                            <span class="result-data-pill">Console: ${consoleCount} logs</span>
                            <span class="result-data-pill">Input Calls: ${inputCount}</span>
                            <span class="result-data-pill">Output Calls: ${outputCount}</span>
                        </div>

                        ${stepsHtml}

                        ${result.error ? `<div class="result-error">${escapeHtml(result.error)}</div>` : ''}

                        ${result.hasDiff ? `
                            <div class="diff-viewer">
                                <div class="diff-header">Value Comparison</div>
                                <div class="diff-content">
                                    <div class="diff-column expected">
                                        <div class="diff-column-header">✓ Expected</div>
                                        <div class="diff-column-content">${JSON.stringify(result.expected, null, 2)}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="diff-column actual">
                                        <div class="diff-column-header">✗ Actual</div>
                                        <div class="diff-column-content">${JSON.stringify(result.actual, null, 2)}</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ` : ''}

                        <div class="result-sections">
                            <div class="result-section" id="console-section-${idx}">
                                <div class="result-section-header" onclick="toggleResultSection('console-section-${idx}')">
                                    <span class="result-section-icon">
                                        <svg width="8" height="4" viewBox="0 0 8 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                            <path d="M1 1L4 3.5L7 1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                        </svg>
                                    </span>
                                    Console Logs (${consoleCount})
                                </div>
                                <div class="result-section-content">
                                    ${consoleCount > 0 
                                        ? result.consoleLogs.map(log => `<div>${log.type}: ${log.message}</div>`).join('')
                                        : 'No console logs'}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="result-section" id="input-section-${idx}">
                                <div class="result-section-header" onclick="toggleResultSection('input-section-${idx}')">
                                    <span class="result-section-icon">
                                        <svg width="8" height="4" viewBox="0 0 8 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                            <path d="M1 1L4 3.5L7 1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                        </svg>
                                    </span>
                                    Input Calls (${inputCount})
                                </div>
                                <div class="result-section-content">
                                    ${inputCount > 0 
                                        ? result.inputCalls.map(call => `<div>Input: ${JSON.stringify(call.data)}</div>`).join('')
                                        : 'No input calls'}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="result-section" id="output-section-${idx}">
                                <div class="result-section-header" onclick="toggleResultSection('output-section-${idx}')">
                                    <span class="result-section-icon">
                                        <svg width="8" height="4" viewBox="0 0 8 4" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                            <path d="M1 1L4 3.5L7 1" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                                        </svg>
                                    </span>
                                    Output Calls (${outputCount})
                                </div>
                                <div class="result-section-content">
                                    ${outputCount > 0 
                                        ? result.outputCalls.map(call => `<div>Output: ${JSON.stringify(call.data)}</div>`).join('')
                                        : 'No output calls'}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        ${result.screenshot && result.status !== 'running' ? `
                            <div class="result-preview">
                                <div class="result-preview-label">Component State After Test</div>
                                <div class="result-preview-img-wrapper has-tooltip" data-tooltip="${result.name}">
                                    <img class="result-preview-img" src="${result.screenshot}" alt="${result.name}" onclick="showScreenshot('${result.screenshot}')">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        ` : ''}
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        function escapeHtml(text) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = text;
            return div.innerHTML;
        }

        // ============================================
        // EVENT HANDLERS
        // ============================================

        function setFilter(filter) {
            state.currentFilter = filter;
            
            document.getElementById('filter-all').classList.toggle('active', filter === 'all');
            document.getElementById('filter-failed').classList.toggle('active', filter === 'failed');
            
            updateTestsList();
        }

        function toggleTestCode(index) {
            const section = document.getElementById(`code-section-${index}`);
            const toggle = document.getElementById(`code-toggle-${index}`);
            
            if (section.classList.contains('visible')) {
                section.classList.remove('visible');
                toggle.classList.remove('open');
            } else {
                section.classList.add('visible');
                toggle.classList.add('open');
            }
        }

        function toggleTestMenu(index) {
            const menu = document.getElementById(`test-menu-${index}`);
            const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('show');
            
            // Close all menus first
            document.querySelectorAll('.test-menu.show').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('show'));
            
            if (!isOpen) {
                menu.classList.add('show');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    const closeMenu = (e) => {
                        if (!e.target.closest('.test-menu-wrapper')) {
                            menu.classList.remove('show');
                            document.removeEventListener('click', closeMenu);
                        }
                    };
                    document.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);
                }, 0);
            }
        }

        function closeTestMenu(index) {
            document.getElementById(`test-menu-${index}`).classList.remove('show');
        }

        function toggleResultSection(id) {
            const section = document.getElementById(id);
            section.classList.toggle('open');
        }

        // ============================================
        // TEST ACTIONS
        // ============================================

        async function runAllTests() {
            state.results = [];
            const progressBar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
            if (progressBar) progressBar.style.width = '0%';
            updateUI();
            
            // Notify host
            window.myop_cta_handler?.('run-all-tests', undefined);

            await loadComponentIntoIframe(0);
            await waitForComponent(0);
            setupEventCapture(0);

            for (let i = 0; i < state.tests.length; i++) {
                await runTest(state.tests[i], updateUI, 0);
                
                if (i < state.tests.length - 1) {
                    await reloadComponentInIframe(0);
                    setupEventCapture(0);
                }
            }
            
            // Notify host of completion
            window.myop_cta_handler?.('tests-completed', {
                results: state.results.map(r => ({
                    name: r.name,
                    status: r.status,
                    duration: r.duration || 0
                }))
            });
        }

        async function runSingleTest(index) {
            const test = state.tests[index];
            console.log('Running test:', test.name);
            
            // Notify host
            window.myop_cta_handler?.('run-single-test', { index, name: test.name });
            
            // Check if component HTML is loaded
            if (!state.componentHtml) {
                console.error('No component HTML loaded');
                const result = {
                    name: test.name,
                    description: test.description,
                    status: 'failed',
                    steps: [{ message: 'No component HTML loaded', status: 'error' }],
                    error: 'No component HTML loaded',
                    startTime: Date.now(),
                    endTime: Date.now(),
                    duration: 0
                };
                state.results.push(result);
                updateUI();
                return;
            }
            
            // Remove existing result for this test
            const existingIndex = state.results.findIndex(r => r.name === test.name);
            if (existingIndex !== -1) {
                state.results.splice(existingIndex, 1);
            }

            try {
                await waitForComponent(0);
                setupEventCapture(0);
                await runTest(test, updateUI, 0);
                await reloadComponentInIframe(0);
                setupEventCapture(0);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error running test:', error);
            }
        }

        function clearResults() {
            state.results = [];
            state.resultsFilter = 'all';
            const progressBar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
            if (progressBar) progressBar.style.width = '0%';
            updateResultsFilterUI();
            updateUI();
            
            // Notify host
            window.myop_cta_handler?.('test-results-cleared', undefined);
        }

        function setResultsFilter(filter) {
            state.resultsFilter = filter;
            
            // Open the right panel if it's collapsed
            const rightPanel = document.getElementById('right-panel');
            if (rightPanel.classList.contains('collapsed')) {
                const floatingSummary = document.getElementById('floating-summary');
                const rightResizeHandle = document.getElementById('right-resize-handle');
                
                rightPanel.classList.remove('collapsed');
                floatingSummary.classList.remove('visible');
                rightResizeHandle.style.display = '';
            }
            
            updateResultsFilterUI();
            updateResultsList();
        }

        function updateResultsFilterUI() {
            // Update summary cards active state
            document.querySelectorAll('.summary-cards .summary-card').forEach(card => {
                const cardFilter = card.dataset.filter;
                if (cardFilter === state.resultsFilter) {
                    card.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    card.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
        }

        async function reloadComponent() {
            await reloadComponentInIframe(0);
            setupEventCapture(0);
        }

        // Update new test name without re-rendering (prevents jump)
        function updateNewTestName(index, value) {
            if (state.tests[index]) {
                state.tests[index].name = value;
                state.hasChanges = true;
            }
        }

        // Update new test description without re-rendering (prevents jump)
        function updateNewTestDescription(index, value) {
            if (state.tests[index]) {
                state.tests[index].description = value;
                state.hasChanges = true;
            }
        }

        // Track which new test field is being edited (for click-to-edit pattern)
        let newTestPendingEditTarget = null;
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            // Capture the target for ALL mousedown events so blur handler can check what was clicked
            newTestPendingEditTarget = e.target;
        });

        function startEditingNewTestField(index, field) {
            state.newTestEditingField = `${field}-${index}`;
            updateUI();
            
            // Focus the input after render
            setTimeout(() => {
                const inputId = field === 'name' ? `new-test-name-${index}` : `new-test-desc-${index}`;
                const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
                if (input) {
                    input.focus();
                    // Position cursor at end
                    input.setSelectionRange(input.value.length, input.value.length);
                }
            }, 0);
        }

        function handleNewTestFieldBlur(index, field) {
            const clickedInSameCard = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest(`#test-card-${index}`);
            
            // Check if clicking on Save or Cancel button - let the click go through
            const clickedSaveBtn = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.btn-save');
            const clickedCancelBtn = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.btn-outline');
            if ((clickedSaveBtn || clickedCancelBtn) && clickedInSameCard) {
                return;
            }
            
            // Check if clicking on the other editable field in same card
            const clickedNameText = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.test-card-name-text');
            const clickedDescText = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.test-card-description-text');
            const clickedNameInput = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.test-card-name-input');
            const clickedDescInput = newTestPendingEditTarget?.closest('.test-card-description-input');
            
            if (field === 'name' && (clickedDescText || clickedDescInput) && clickedInSameCard) {
                // Switching from name to description
                state.newTestEditingField = `desc-${index}`;
                updateUI();
                setTimeout(() => {

            state.tests[index].testFn = functionBody;

            state.hasChanges = true;

        function waitForComponent(index = 0, timeout = 5000) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const startTime = Date.now();
                const check = () => {
                    const iframe = document.getElementById(`component-iframe-${index}`);
                    if (iframe?.contentWindow?.myop_init_interface) {
                        resolve();
                    } else if (Date.now() - startTime > timeout) {
                        // Timeout - resolve anyway to allow test to run (it may fail naturally)
                        console.warn('waitForComponent timed out - component may not have myop_init_interface');
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        setTimeout(check, 100);
                    }
                };
                check();
            });
        }

        async function updateIframeGrid(count) {
            const container = document.getElementById('iframe-container');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            container.className = 'iframe-container';

            if (count === 1) {
                container.classList.add('single');
            } else if (count <= 4) {
                container.classList.add('grid-2');
            } else {
                container.classList.add('grid-3');
            }

            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                wrapper.className = 'iframe-wrapper';
                wrapper.id = `iframe-wrapper-${i}`;
                
                const label = document.createElement('div');
                label.className = 'iframe-label';
                label.id = `iframe-label-${i}`;
                label.textContent = ''; // Empty initially - no tooltip until test runs
                
                const hoverOverlay = document.createElement('div');
                hoverOverlay.className = 'iframe-hover-overlay';
                hoverOverlay.id = `iframe-hover-${i}`;
                
                const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                iframe.id = `component-iframe-${i}`;
                iframe.className = 'component-iframe';
                
                wrapper.appendChild(label);
                wrapper.appendChild(hoverOverlay);
                wrapper.appendChild(iframe);
                container.appendChild(wrapper);
            }

            // Load component into all iframes
            const loadPromises = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                loadPromises.push(loadComponentIntoIframe(i));
            }
            await Promise.all(loadPromises);
        }

        // ============================================
        // HOST INTERFACE (Myop Integration)
        // ============================================

        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            // Getter mode - return current state
            if (!data) {
                return {
                    componentName: state.componentName,
                    componentHtml: state.componentHtml,
                    tests: state.tests.map(t => ({
                        name: t.name,
                        description: t.description,
                        code: t.sourceCode
                    }))
                };
            }

            // Setter mode - initialize with data
            try {
                state.tests = [];
                state.results = [];
                state.componentName = data.componentName || 'Unknown Component';
                state.componentHtml = data.componentHtml || '';

                if (data.tests && Array.isArray(data.tests)) {
                    data.tests.forEach(test => {
                        let code = test.code.trim();
                        code = code.replace(/\((\w+):\s*\w+\)/g, '($1)');
                        
                        const match = code.match(/^(?:async\s+)?\([^)]*\)\s*=>\s*{([\s\S]*)}$/);
                        const functionBody = match ? match[1].trim() : code;
                        
                        registerTest(test.name, test.description, functionBody, test.code);
                    });
                }

                // Load component into iframe (async but don't wait)
                loadComponentIntoIframe(0);
                
                // Update UI synchronously
                updateUI();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error in myop_init_interface:', error);
            }
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action, payload) {
            console.log(`[HOST EVENT] ${action}:`, payload);
            if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
                window.parent.postMessage({
                    type: 'myop_test_runner',
                    action,
                    payload,
                    timestamp: Date.now()
                }, '*');
            }
        };

        // ============================================
        // PANEL RESIZE FUNCTIONALITY
        // ============================================

        (function initResizeHandlers() {
            const leftPanel = document.getElementById('left-panel');
            const middlePanel = document.getElementById('middle-panel');
            const rightPanel = document.getElementById('right-panel');
            const leftHandle = document.getElementById('left-resize-handle');
            const rightHandle = document.getElementById('right-resize-handle');
            const overlay = document.getElementById('resize-overlay');

            const MIN_LEFT_WIDTH = 300;
            const MIN_RIGHT_WIDTH = 300;
            const MIN_MIDDLE_WIDTH = 300;

            let isResizing = false;
            let currentHandle = null;
            let startX = 0;
            let startWidth = 0;

            function startResize(e, handle, panel) {
                isResizing = true;
                currentHandle = handle;
                startX = e.clientX;
                startWidth = panel.offsetWidth;

                handle.classList.add('active');
                overlay.classList.add('active');
                document.body.classList.add('resizing');

                e.preventDefault();
            }

            function doResize(e) {
                if (!isResizing) return;

                const modalContent = document.querySelector('.modal-content');
                const totalWidth = modalContent.offsetWidth;

                if (currentHandle === leftHandle) {
                    const delta = e.clientX - startX;
                    let newWidth = startWidth + delta;

                    // Clamp to min/max
                    newWidth = Math.max(MIN_LEFT_WIDTH, newWidth);

                    // Check if middle panel would be too small
                    const rightWidth = rightPanel.offsetWidth;
                    const handleWidths = 16; // 8px * 2 handles
                    const maxLeftWidth = totalWidth - rightWidth - handleWidths - MIN_MIDDLE_WIDTH;
                    newWidth = Math.min(newWidth, maxLeftWidth);

                    leftPanel.style.width = newWidth + 'px';
                } else if (currentHandle === rightHandle) {
                    const delta = startX - e.clientX;
                    let newWidth = startWidth + delta;

                    // Clamp to min/max
                    newWidth = Math.max(MIN_RIGHT_WIDTH, newWidth);

                    // Check if middle panel would be too small
                    const leftWidth = leftPanel.offsetWidth;
                    const handleWidths = 16; // 8px * 2 handles
                    const maxRightWidth = totalWidth - leftWidth - handleWidths - MIN_MIDDLE_WIDTH;
                    newWidth = Math.min(newWidth, maxRightWidth);

                    rightPanel.style.width = newWidth + 'px';
                }
            }

            function stopResize() {
                if (!isResizing) return;

                isResizing = false;
                if (currentHandle) {
                    currentHandle.classList.remove('active');
                }
                currentHandle = null;
                overlay.classList.remove('active');
                document.body.classList.remove('resizing');
            }

            // Left handle events
            leftHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                startResize(e, leftHandle, leftPanel);
            });

            // Right handle events
            rightHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                startResize(e, rightHandle, rightPanel);
            });

            // Overlay captures mouse events during drag
            overlay.addEventListener('mousemove', doResize);
            overlay.addEventListener('mouseup', stopResize);
            overlay.addEventListener('mouseleave', stopResize);

            // Also listen on document for edge cases
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', stopResize);
        })();

        const tooltipEl = document.createElement('div');

        tooltipEl.id = 'global-tooltip';
        document.body.appendChild(tooltipEl);

        function isTextTruncated(element) {
            return element.scrollWidth > element.clientWidth;
        }

        function showTooltip(e) {
            const target = e.currentTarget;
            
            // Only show tooltip if text is truncated
            if (!isTextTruncated(target)) {
                return;
            }
            
            const tooltipText = target.dataset.tooltip || target.textContent.trim();
            
            if (!tooltipText) return;
            
            tooltipEl.textContent = tooltipText;
            
            const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
            
            // Position above the element
            let top = rect.top - 8 - 26; // 26 is approximate tooltip height
            let left = rect.left;
            
            // Make sure it doesn't go off screen
            if (top < 8) {
                top = rect.bottom + 8; // Show below instead
            }
            if (left + 200 > window.innerWidth) {
                left = window.innerWidth - 200;
            }
            
            tooltipEl.style.top = `${top}px`;
            tooltipEl.style.left = `${left}px`;
            tooltipEl.classList.add('visible');
        }

        function hideTooltip() {
            tooltipEl.classList.remove('visible');
        }

        // Attach tooltip listeners to existing and future elements
        document.addEventListener('mouseover', (e) => {
            const target = e.target.closest('.has-tooltip');
            if (target) {
                showTooltip({ currentTarget: target });
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('mouseout', (e) => {
            const target = e.target.closest('.has-tooltip');
            if (target && !target.contains(e.relatedTarget)) {
                hideTooltip();
            }
        });
    </script>
